deploymentInstructions.seedMethod: IFreedomConfigService.set() per key, within tenant's AsyncLocalStorage context

flow01_invitation_inviter_name.rationale: Tenant-specific branding in invitation email body. 'That an invitation exists' is MACHINE, the name is FREEDOM.

flow01_invitation_community_name.rationale: Tenant community name in invitation body.

flow01_email_verification_ttl_seconds.rationale: Stricter abuse profile — 1h token TTL vs 24h default; 24× tighter.

flow01_resend_rate_limit_minutes.rationale: Reduce friction for legitimate resend attempts; 4× faster than default.

machineInvariantsPreserved: Event names: AccountCreated, VerificationEmailRequested, VerificationCompleted, OnboardingCompleted
Material type literals: workspace_setup, flow_tutorial, community_invitation
Idempotency key format and outbox ordering (storeDocument before enqueue)

v15DriftContract.expectedDrift: 0 px on every PNG (byte-identical to platform-source baseline)
v15DriftContract.rationale: All 4 overrides are server-side-only; no FLOW-01 client kiosk page renders any of them
